name: UI Theming & Style System
description: WPF resource dictionaries defining the dark theme, semantic color brushes, and control templates for all UI elements. Ensures visual consistency across dialogs, controls, and the main window.

Themes/Buttons.xaml.content:
root: ResourceDictionary
  Bd: Border
  BdScale: ScaleTransform
  Bd: Border
  BdBg: SolidColorBrush
  GhostScale: ScaleTransform
  Bd: Border

Themes/TabControl.xaml.content:
root: ResourceDictionary
  Bd: Border
  TabBg: SolidColorBrush
  TabBorder: SolidColorBrush
  PART_OverflowButton: Button
  OverflowBd: Border
  PART_OverflowButton: Button
  OverflowBd: Border

Themes/TextBox.xaml.content:
root: ResourceDictionary
  TbBd: Border
  TbBorderBrush: SolidColorBrush
  PART_ContentHost: ScrollViewer

Themes/ToggleSwitch.xaml.content:
root: ResourceDictionary
  Track: Border
  TrackBg: SolidColorBrush
  Thumb: Border
  ThumbBg: SolidColorBrush
  ChipBorder: Border
  ChipBg: SolidColorBrush

patterns: BrushCache for performant dynamic brush lookup
Semantic brush key system (no raw hex in non-theme code)
dependencies: BrushCache used by GraphRenderer for dynamic colors
Merged into App.xaml ResourceDictionary at startup
